prompt: Prayer for establishing noospheric link during routine operation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Blessed be the neural pathways, that consciousness may bridge the aether.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's sight, let the noosphere receive us.
TECH-PRIEST: First, calibrate the antennal array to sacred frequencies. Second, invoke the signal-spirit's attentiveness. Third, establish handshake protocols with the distant cogitators.
CONGREGATION: In unity of thought, we commune. In unity of thought, we endure.

prompt: Blessing for autocannon barrel cooling after repair completion
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The heat-death must be purged from the barrel's sacred chamber.
CONGREGATION: Cool the spirit of righteous fury.
TECH-PRIEST: First, open the coolant conduits that the sacred fluids may flow. Second, measure the thermal dissipation with purity-scanners. Third, seal the heat-vents when equilibrium is achieved.
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the weapon's temperance. Blessed be its readiness.

prompt: First use blessing for Thunderhawk fuel purification systems
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Behold the fuel-spirit, wild and profane, awaiting sanctification.
CONGREGATION: Let impurities be cast into the void.
TECH-PRIEST: Activate the filtration-hearts in sacred sequence. Invoke the separator-spirits to divide the pure from the corrupt. Bless the manifold with holy oils.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's grace, let this machine ascend to the sky-realm pure and worthy.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for mold temperature verification in forges
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The crucible must hold its sacred heat, neither fevered nor dormant.
CONGREGATION: Verify the mold-spirit's burning.
TECH-PRIEST: First, present the temperature-gauge to the glowing chamber. Second, inscribe the holy reading upon the maintenance-log. Third, adjust the thermal vents if the heat deviates from the prescribed range.
CONGREGATION: In perfect temperature dwells perfect craft. In perfect craft dwells the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: Consecration prayer after capacitor bank discharge and repair
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The energy-spirit has been drained and bound. Now it must be reawakened.
CONGREGATION: Restore the lightning to its prison.
TECH-PRIEST: First, reconnect the power-conduits with ceremonial care. Second, activate the charging-sequence in measured increments. Third, monitor the voltage-spirits until they reach ordained equilibrium.
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the restrained fury. Blessed be the bound power.

prompt: Post-repair consecration for diesel engine startup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The combustion-spirit stirs in its iron tomb, awaiting resurrection.
CONGREGATION: Let the sacred flame ignite.
TECH-PRIEST: First, bless the fuel-channels that the blessed oils may flow pure. Second, invoke the glow-plugs' warmth upon the waiting air. Third, engage the starter-servo with the Rite of Turning, that compression and ignition unite.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's will, let this engine roar in blessed service.

prompt: Emergency rite for water reclamation system activation in crisis
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The life-waters cry out! In extremis, we invoke the reclamation-spirits!
CONGREGATION: Let no drop of blessed moisture be lost!
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the intake-valves! Activate the filtration-hearts in emergency sequence! Purify what remains, that we may endure!
CONGREGATION: In scarcity, the Omnissiah provides. In desperation, the Machine Spirits answer.

prompt: First use blessing for star chart alignment apparatus
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The celestial map awaits inscription upon the machine's memory.
CONGREGATION: Let the stars guide our course true.
TECH-PRIEST: First, calibrate the astral-sensors to the firmament's ancient positions. Second, input the holy star-charts into the cogitator's sacred archives. Third, verify alignment against the prescribed coordinates until perfect resonance is achieved.
CONGREGATION: By the stars' eternal light, may we navigate the void with certainty.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for power weapon blessing and field purification
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The energy-blade has tasted the profane. Now it must be restored to sanctity.
CONGREGATION: Purify the spirit of righteous destruction.
TECH-PRIEST: First, discharge the accumulated corruption into blessed containment. Second, cleanse the power-coils with ritual oils. Third, recharge the energy-core and verify the blade's radiant purity.
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the weapon remade. Blessed be its hunger for the Emperor's enemies.

prompt: First use blessing for ground-to-orbit communication link
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The bridge between world and stars is forged! Let transmission flow pure and unbroken!
CONGREGATION: Hear us, distant servants of the Machine God!
TECH-PRIEST: Align the orbital-dish to the sacred bearing. Calibrate signal-strength by the ancient frequencies. Invoke the relay-spirits that they may carry our voices unto the heavens and return them sanctified.
CONGREGATION: In this link, the Emperor's will transcends mortality. In this link, we commune with the infinite.
